name: devlauncher-automation
description: Create, validate, update, and bind DevLauncher workflows from Codex through local MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Build DevLauncher workflows from natural-language requests.
interface.longDescription: DevLauncher Automation lets Codex inspect workflow capabilities, preview deterministic workflow definitions, save them with revision protection, and bind them to virtual keyboard keys without directly editing YAML.
defaultPrompt: Create a DevLauncher workflow for my development environment.
Bind an existing DevLauncher workflow to a virtual keyboard key.
Review my DevLauncher workflows and find invalid completion rules.
